meaning_en: A Japanese name whose meaning comes from its kanji.
description_en: The name Atsuyuki (温幸) is a common modern Japanese male name.

meaning_en: A Japanese name combining the meanings of precious, value, noble.
description_en: The name Atsuyoshi (貴佳) is a common modern Japanese male name. It is formed from kanji characters that evoke imagery of precious and value.

etymology_en: From Japanese 歩 (ayu) meaning "walk, step" and 夢 (mu) meaning "dream, vision". It can also be written with 歩 alone, or with other combinations of kanji.
From Japanese 歩 (ayu) meaning "walk, step" and 夢 (mu) meaning "dream, vision". It can also be written with 歩 alone, or with other combinations of kanji.

From Japanese 新 (arata) meaning "fresh, new". Other kanji or kanji combinations can also form this name.

meaning_en: A Japanese name whose meaning comes from its kanji.
description_en: The name Arata (改) is a common modern Japanese male name. From Japanese 新 (arata) meaning "fresh, new". Other kanji or kanji combinations can also form this name.
etymology_en: From Japanese 新 (arata) meaning "fresh, new". Other kanji or kanji combinations can also form this name.

From Japanese 功 (isao) or 勲 (isao) both meaning "merit". Other kanji characters or combinations can form this name as well.

From Japanese 勇 (isamu) meaning "brave" or other kanji having the same pronunciation.

meaning_en: A Japanese name combining the meanings of assistant, help.
description_en: The name Isamu (威佐武) is a common modern Japanese male name. From Japanese 勇 (isamu) meaning "brave" or other kanji having the same pronunciation.
etymology_en: From Japanese 勇 (isamu) meaning "brave" or other kanji having the same pronunciation.
